title: Official Ph1LzA Pack
description: A resource pack of small additions to base Netherite Textures (tools & armour) and a Main menu panorama.
body:
Resource Pack with my own customised Netherite Tools & Armour textures to include a Diamond accent.

Other additions:
- ENDlantis Hardcore Season 4 Project Menu Background Panorama.
- Enchantment Glint adjustment and colour map for an older version feel.
- Netherite Chestplate from a V-neck to a Turtle neck design.

Some of these changes have become a little obsolete since 2020, for example Mojang adding Armour trims & accessibility options for enchantment glint glare strength!
